content_fingerprint: fal ai adds runner termination reason diagnostics and observability tools to serverless platform fal ai has introduced runner termination reason diagnostics and expanded scaling and observability features on its serverless ai inference platform according to an april 23 2026 changelog update fal ai has shipped a new runner termination reason feature on its serverless dashboard giving developers a way to diagnose why a runner was stopped directly from the platform interface the termination reason is now shown inline across every runner surface and on the runner detail page replacing what was pre
